framework.name: Agno
framework.description: Component-based modular agent framework (formerly Phidata). Clean separation: Brain (model), Body (tools), Knowledge (RAG), Storage (sessions), Memory (user recall), Reasoning. Multi-agent via Coordinator / Router / Collaborator modes.

modules.name: Agent
modules.description: Core container assembling all components. Stateless by design — new instance per request (~2-3µs instantiation). Orchestrates model calls, tool use, knowledge retrieval.

modules.name: Model (Brain)
modules.description: Unified interface to 23+ providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.). Multi-modal I/O: text, image, audio, video.

modules.name: Tools Registry (Body)
modules.description: Manages external integrations: APIs, databases, custom services. MCP support with streaming. Resolves tool requests at runtime.

modules.name: Knowledge (RAG)
modules.description: Agentic RAG by default — searches 20+ vector DBs at runtime for needed context. Hybrid search (vector + keyword) rather than stuffing all context in prompt.

modules.name: Storage Backend
modules.description: Session history + state persistence in DB (SQLite, Postgres). Essential for multi-turn conversations and stateful interactions.

modules.name: Memory
modules.description: Long-term user recall: classify, store, recall user preferences across sessions. Enables personalized agent behavior.

modules.name: Reasoning Engine
modules.description: First-class reasoning: ReasoningModels, ReasoningTools, custom chain-of-thought. Agents 'think' before responding.

modules.name: AgentOS Runtime
modules.description: Pre-built FastAPI app + browser control plane dashboard. Runs in your cloud for data privacy. Instantiates and manages agent lifecycle.

modules.name: Tool
modules.description: Individual tool functions: APIs, calculators, web search, code execution. Invoked by Agent via Tools Registry resolution.

metadata.description: AgentOS creates fresh Agent instance per request
Agent sends prompt + context to Model; receives completion response
Agent passes query through Reasoning Engine for chain-of-thought before acting
Agent requests tool; Registry resolves and returns appropriate tool instance
Registry invokes resolved tool; result flows back to Agent
Agent queries Knowledge for domain-specific context via hybrid search
Store/recall user preferences and facts across sessions
Save/load conversation history and agent state
On subsequent requests, AgentOS loads session state for continuity
AgentOS feeds documents to Knowledge for vector indexing at app startup
Reasoning output enriches the prompt sent to the Model
Tool execution result returned to Agent for analysis

phases.name: Agent Initialization
phases.description: AgentOS creates a fresh stateless Agent, loads session context, recalls user memory

steps.description: Session history loaded from Storage Backend
User preferences and facts recalled from long-term Memory

phases.name: Agent Execution Loop
phases.description: Agent reasons, retrieves knowledge, calls tools, and generates response

steps.description: Agent begins processing with full context
Reasoning Engine performs chain-of-thought before acting
Agent queries Knowledge (RAG) for domain context via hybrid search
If tool needed: Tools Registry resolves appropriate tool
Resolved tool executes; result returns to Agent
Agent sends enriched prompt (instructions + context + tool results) to Model
Agent formats final response from model output
